missing_components: methodology — no scoring rubric or algorithm provided
raw_signals — no underlying metrics (sales volume, review counts, social-media engagement) available as structured data
reason: Legacy week28.json stores opaque integer scores (0-100) with no decomposable components, weights, or methodology documentation. Scores cannot be independently recomputed from available data.

validation_rules.description: All non-zero scores must be between 0 and 100
Within each panel, scores must be non-increasing by rank
Heat rankings must not contain score=0 placeholder products
Cannot recompute: no score components available
